public_cfd_bundle.field_semantics: absolute public-CFD rho; point-sample versus finite-volume cell-average unresolved

direct_warm_training.selection_rule: minimum calibration mean gauge-relative-L2, then worst, then smaller multiplier

validation_frozen_refinement_depth.selection_rule: minimum validation mean posthoc field relative-L2, then smaller K

decision.next_gate: obtain at least three additional public PoolFire trajectories and freeze a trajectory-level fresh protocol before a small neural warm-start

claim_boundary: The verified values are public CFD rho values, but rho units and cell semantics remain unconfirmed.
The reference observation is a density-gradient numerical proxy, not a calibrated BOS/BOST image displacement.
The ridge map is a classical direct baseline, not DeepONet, FNO, FFNO, or a proposed algorithm.
All train/calibration/evaluation frames come from one trajectory; later-time evaluation is not generalization.
The five later-time frames were opened during v0 development; they are exploratory, not a fresh confirmatory test.
Field and gradient errors are post-hoc and never control solver execution.

The evaluation initializer now runs in a fresh exec process with a fixed model-plus-observation request. Seatbelt denies the declared CFD bundle and network, but the parent constructs the request before post-hoc scoring; evaluation-truth and filesystem-wide noninterference are not proven.
Worker max RSS measures only the standalone initializer process; whole-pipeline peak memory remains unavailable.
No real BOST reconstruction, speedup, neural superiority, cross-condition transfer, or paper claim is made.
